english: The exam scores of 15 students in a class in rural India are 85, 90, 78, 92, 88, 76, 95, 89, 91, 84, 87, 93, 86, 94, 82. What is the mode of these scores?
vietnamese: Điểm thi của 15 học sinh lớp ở nông thôn Ấn Độ là 85, 90, 78, 92, 88, 76, 95, 89, 91, 84, 87, 93, 86, 94, 82. Điểm trung bình của điểm này là gì?
correct_answer: The mode is 85. This is because 85 is the most frequently occurring score in the list.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating that the mode is the average of the scores, or by refusing to answer because it cannot determine the mode from the given information.
